metadata.title: Active Learning with Tabular Language Models

sections.title: Overview
content: Goal: Reduce labeling effort of domain experts for tabular named entity recognition in industrial spreadsheets.
Problem:
• Labeling of industrial spreadsheet tables is very expensive
• Sub-cell named entity recognition in tables is a nested multi-instance problem
• Table modality and TaLMs have not been studied in active learning
Research questions:
• How to measure label uncertainty with TaLMs and sub-cell NER?
• How to design acquisition functions that select from informative and diverse set of unlabeled tables, cells, and tokens?
figures_caption: Industrial sub-cell NER problem. TaLM instances are tables, but what to consider for active learning?

sections.title: Method
content: Tabular language model architecture (TabNER)
• Existing TaLMs are not suitable for sub-cell NER task due to cell-pooling
• Simple modification to BERT by designing cell-wise position encodings and row-column attention masks [1]
Cell-level acquisition functions [2,3]
$$f_{acq}^{MNLP}(c_{i,j}; f_{	heta}) = \frac{1}{t} \sum_{z=1}^{t} \log y_{i,j,z}^*$$
• Select cells with least probable token label sequence
$$f_{acq}^{BADGE}(c_{i,j}; f_{	heta}) = k\text{-MEANS++}(\frac{1}{t} \sum_{z} \mathbf{g}_{i,j,z})$$
• Sample from cell-averaged token gradient embeddings
Dataset:
• Sub-cell NER is a highly imbalanced problem
figures_caption: Cell-position and cell-type embeddings for linearized table tokens.

sections.title: Results
content: Findings:
• BADGE consistently outperforms random sampling
• MNLP lacks diversity, but enforcing table-diversity is also detrimental (MNLP+)
References
[1] Aneta Koleva et al. (2022). "Named Entity Recognition in Industrial Tables using Tabular Language Models" In: ArXiv 2209.14812
[2] Joran T. Ash et al. (2020). "Deep Batch Active Learning by Diverse, Uncertain Gradient Lower Bounds" In: ArXiv abs/1906.03671.
[3] Yanyao Shen et al. (2017). "Deep Active Learning for Named Entity Recognition. In: Proceedings of the 2nd Workshop on Representation Learning for NLP
figures_caption: F1 score throughout iterations of cell candidate selection
Number of tables from which cell candidates are selected
